ogTitle: Swan Reach vs Swanpool: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Swan Reach and Swanpool.
heading: Swan Reach vs Swanpool — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Swan Reach, Victoria and Swanpool, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Swanpool has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Swan Reach (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Swan Reach or Swanpool safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Swan Reach has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Swanpool scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Swan Reach scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Swanpool scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Swan Reach or Swanpool?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Swanpool has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.77% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
